description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3 Docker image with a pip cache at .cache and variables PIP_CACHE_DIR set to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache and SAST_EXCLUDED_ANALYZERS listing several analyzers. Include the local templates .gitlab/gitlab-templates.yml and .gitlab/pylint.yml and the Jobs/SAST.gitlab-ci.yml template, and define stages test and build. In the test stage add a smoketest job that runs pip install requests python-musicpd sphinx, python setup.py test, python setup.py bdist_wheel sdist, sphinx-build -d ./build/doctrees doc/source -b man ./build/man/, sphinx-build -d ./build/doctrees doc/source -b html ./build/html/, pip install dist/*.whl, mpd-sima --help, TRACE=y ./mpd-sima -d --pid ./mpd-sima.pid -l ./mpd-sima.log, sleep 10, and test -f ./mpd-sima.pid && kill $(cat ./mpd-sima.pid); it stores artifacts dist/*.whl, dist/*.tar.gz, dist/*.zip, ./mpd-sima.pid, ./mpd-sima.log expiring in 1 hour. Also in the test stage add an unittests job that runs pip install pytest-cov requests python-musicpd, py.test -q --cov=sima --junitxml=report.xml tests, always publishes report.xml as a JUnit artifact and extracts coverage with the given regex. In the build stage add a tag_release job that runs python -V, depends on the smoketest job, stores artifacts named $CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_TAG containing dist/*.whl, dist/*.tar.gz, dist/*.zip, and runs only on tag pushes.
